# ShopFiesta
ShopFiesta is a full-stack e-commerce platform offering festive finds and holiday items. 

## Navigation
- [Home](https://shopfiesta.vercel.app/)
- [Products](https://shopfiesta.vercel.app/products)
- [About Us](https://shopfiesta.vercel.app/about)
- [Support](https://shopfiesta.vercel.app/support)

## Important Notes
- All prices are in USD.
- Free shipping is offered on orders over $100.
